meta.title: 4 of the biggest things movies get WRONG about fighter jets
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

While we often tend to dismiss pop culture as little more than a distraction from the more serious aspects of our adult lives, the truth is, the media that we consume when we’re looking to shut our brains off is a lot more important than we like to think. So, let's talk about the myths about military aviation we've learned from movies.
